---
toc: false
title-block-style: default
format: 
  html: 
    grid: # default widths
      body-width: 800px
      margin-width: 250px
      sidebar-width: 250px
listing:
  - id: listing-features
    contents: 
    - ./features/
    - "!/features/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description] 
---

***`P`ressmark*** - an elegant, typographic theme for Quarto websites. Inspired by newspapers like [The Atlantic](https://www.theatlantic.com/) and the [Financial Times](https://www.ft.com/) as well as [Edward Tufte's design principles](https://edwardtufte.github.io/tufte-css/). Made for sites centered around text, that do not want to compromise on good design. Feauturing carefully selected fonts, well thought-trough default styling, and a bunch of quirks.

[`<button>GitHub</button>`{=html}](https://github.com/skriptum/quarto-pressmark)
[`<button>Showcase</button>`{=html}](https://mdwm.org)



### Quickstart




Learn more in the [Setup Guide](setup.qmd)


### Features

::: {#listing-features}

:::

> **Pressmark** _noun_: A notation or figure in the margin of a printed sheet indicating the press on which it was printed. 
>
> ***The American Heritage® Dictionary of the English Language, 5th Edition.***
